# 💳 Credit Card Loan Approval Prediction

## 📌 Project Overview
This project is a Machine Learning model that predicts whether a customer will be approved for a credit card loan or not based on various input features.

It helps financial institutions to:
- Reduce risk
- Automate loan approval
- Improve decision-making

---

## 🚀 Features
- Data preprocessing and cleaning
- Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA)
- Machine Learning model training
- Prediction system for loan approval
- Visualization of results

---

## 🧠 Technologies Used
- Python
- NumPy
- Pandas
- Matplotlib / Seaborn
- Scikit-learn
- Jupyter Notebook

---

## 📊 Dataset
The dataset includes features like:
- Age
- Income
- Credit Score
- Employment Status
- Loan Amount
- Other financial attributes

---
